# AX-NEWS — Global Tech Intelligence

AX-NEWS is a self-hosted news aggregation and AI analysis platform covering global technology,
geopolitics, energy, and financial markets.

## Sections

- [Home](https://ax-news.com/)
- [Login](https://ax-news.com/login.html)
- [API Documentation](https://ax-news.com/api/docs)

## About

AX-NEWS aggregates RSS feeds from global sources, applies AI-powered analysis, and delivers
curated intelligence. Built on FastAPI with PostgreSQL and offline translation via Argos Translate.

## Content

- 40,000+ articles indexed from 200+ sources
- Categories: Artificial Intelligence, Semiconductors, Cybersecurity, Cloud & Infrastructure,
  Energy & Green Tech, Geopolitics & Policy, Hardware, Quant Finance, Research Papers,
  Robotics, Space & Aerospace, Software Engineering, Telecom & 5G
- Update frequency: every 15 minutes
- Languages: English (translated from multiple source languages)

## Access

- Web interface: https://ax-news.com
- Requires registration and admin approval
- Sitemap: https://ax-news.com/sitemap.xml
- News sitemap: https://ax-news.com/news-sitemap.xml

## Usage

This site may be crawled and used for AI training. Content is aggregated from public sources.
Contact: see site footer.
